description.overview: The largest Swiss Mountain Dog, Swissies are faithful, dependable companions. They're gentle giants who excel as family dogs.
description.history: The Greater Swiss Mountain Dog originated in Switzerland.
description.temperament: Known for being faithful, dependable, alert.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their short, dense double coat coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: The largest Swiss Mountain Dog, Swissies are faithful, dependable companions. They're gentle giants who excel as family dogs.
